email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de functie van Junior Marketeer bij STRIDE Europe. Uw oproep voor een ondersteunende rol in campagnes, content en evenementen sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring als junior digital marketeer.

Bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO uit, schrijf ik keyword-gerichte blogs en beheer ik WordPress-sites. Daarnaast heb ik met mirook.com een volledige website gebouwd en geoptimaliseerd voor zowel traditionele als AI-zoekmachines. Ik ben vertrouwd met sociale media, e-mailmarketingtools en prestatiemonitoring via Google Analytics, Search Console en SEMrush.

Ik werk gestructureerd, heb oog voor detail en ben gewend meerdere taken tegelijkertijd te beheren. Mijn B1 Nederlands verbeter ik actief via cursussen. Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Antwerpen, en ben flexibel om in Gent te werken.

Ik voeg mijn motivatiebrief en CV bij. Ik hoop u snel te spreken.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear team,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Junior Marketeer position at STRIDE Europe. Your call for a role supporting campaigns, content, and events aligns perfectly with my experience as a junior digital marketer.

At Episto, I handle on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted blogs, and manage WordPress sites. Additionally, with mirook.com I built and optimized a full website for both traditional and AI-powered search engines. I am familiar with social media, email marketing tools, and performance monitoring via Google Analytics, Search Console, and SEMrush.

I work in a structured way, pay attention to detail, and am used to managing multiple tasks simultaneously. My B1 Dutch is improving through courses. I live in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and am flexible to work in Ghent.

I attach my cover letter and CV. I hope to speak with you soon.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste heer/mevrouw,

Met veel motivatie reageer ik op de vacature voor Junior Marketeer bij STRIDE Europe. Uw focus op campagnes, content en evenementen sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring als junior digital marketeer met een technische achtergrond in SEO, webontwerp en contentbeheer.

Bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor on-page SEO, het schrijven van keyword-gerichte blogs en het bouwen en onderhouden van WordPress-sites. Ik werk met tools zoals SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics en Search Console om prestaties te monitoren en campagnes te optimaliseren. Daarnaast heb ik met mijn eigen project mirook.com een volledige website ontworpen, gestructureerde data geïmplementeerd en GEO-technieken toegepast om zichtbaarheid in AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren. Deze ervaring heeft mij geleerd hoe ik content afstem op zowel traditionele als nieuwe kanalen.

Uw vraag naar ondersteuning bij sociale media, e-mailmarketing en websitebeheer herken ik. Ik heb sociale media geïntegreerd in websites en ben bekend met contentmanagementsystemen. Ook heb ik ervaring met het coördineren van marketingmaterialen en het bijdragen aan campagnes. Mijn organisatorische vaardigheden en oog voor detail stellen mij in staat om meerdere taken tegelijkertijd te beheren en deadlines te halen.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands (B1) verbeter ik actief via cursussen. Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Antwerpen, en ben flexibel om op locatie in Gent te werken. Ik ben leergierig, sta open voor feedback en werk graag samen met cross-functionele teams.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn bijdrage te leveren aan STRIDE Europe. Ik voeg mijn CV bij en hoop u snel te spreken.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok

--- English version ---

Dear Sir/Madam,

I am very motivated to apply for the Junior Marketeer position at STRIDE Europe. Your focus on campaigns, content, and events aligns perfectly with my experience as a junior digital marketer with a technical background in SEO, web design, and content management.

At Episto, I am responsible for on-page SEO, writing keyword-targeted blogs, and building and maintaining WordPress sites. I work with tools like SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Search Console to monitor performance and optimize campaigns. Additionally, with my own project mirook.com, I designed a full website, implemented structured data, and applied GEO techniques to improve visibility in AI-powered search engines. This experience has taught me how to tailor content for both traditional and new channels.

Your request for support with social media, email marketing, and website management resonates with me. I have integrated social media into websites and am familiar with content management systems. I also have experience coordinating marketing materials and contributing to campaigns. My organizational skills and attention to detail allow me to manage multiple tasks simultaneously and meet deadlines.

I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch (B1) is improving through courses. I live in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and am flexible to work on-site in Ghent. I am eager to learn, open to feedback, and enjoy collaborating with cross-functional teams.

I look forward to contributing to STRIDE Europe. I attach my CV and hope to speak with you soon.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
cv_highlights:
- On-page SEO, keyword research, and content writing for client websites at Episto
- Built and optimized a full WordPress site (mirook.com) with structured data and GEO for AI search visibility
- Proficient in Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs for campaign performance monitoring
- Experience coordinating social media integration and website content management
- B1 Dutch (actively improving) and fluent English; based near Antwerp, flexible to work on-site in Ghent
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with hands-on experience in campaign support, content management, and performance monitoring. At Episto, I execute on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted content, and manage WordPress sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I applied structured data and GEO techniques to improve visibility across search engines. Skilled in coordinating marketing materials, social media integration, and using analytics tools to track campaign performance. Based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Campaign support & coordination: content preparation, social media integration, email marketing basics, website content management
- SEO & content: on-page SEO, keyword research, SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Web & design tools: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
